textByHashes.55531a27849581af2c21f4934f5f57148f1de191: Greetings. What wisdom do you seek?
textByHashes.6856fb04bb054aa96f8d3696aea20ed11fe72e75: Me? I'm here to grant you rewards for any of the Pizazz Points you may have earned in this training arena. Like my fellow Guardians, I am part of the arena and live to ensure its safe running.
textByHashes.ff6962a6a9b2af5dddf2487ebccc82403e03fb64: Well, we do stock a special book that you may be interested in, which provides a comprehensive guide to this training arena. It costs 200 coins. Would you like one?
textByHashes.f4543c72d745d2edb833b400da8c239e4875896e: Very good, that'll be 200 coins please!
textByHashes.088a6c723be1a22753721dfb4c64a7be7a292d2b: It's not old and it certainly isn't dusty, but suit yourself.
textByHashes.c2a24a128b4b1234c1c04084f98cc9c68ba6818e: Let me know if you lose it.
textByHashes.cd051574db09bc41f6e2e6c8f6d3b8586d30c202: Use what you've learned, young one.
textByHashes.49427fc073d8a92aee2cfe52cc766af6140690ad: Greetings. Have you spoken to my fellow Guardian downstairs?
textByHashes.dbb4f24c602caff01d9744b9cdadb150b62cdb3d: Well, you need to talk to him first.
